title: iGate India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: iGate India Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
iGate India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
